channel.title: microblog on pixyc.cc
channel.description: Recent content in microblog on pixyc.cc

item.title: linux update!
item.description: ok ok. since my case and mobo arrived, i finally rebuilt my pc. and since i have a mac now, i’ve offload most creative tasks to it. that means there was nothing stopping me from running linux full time on my desktop. my second drives are even all ext4 now you cant tell i’m committed. now it acts mostly as a file server and occasional vr machine (vrchat runs just fine, you just need to know about proton-ge-rtsp, wivrn, and wayvr)
logic pro makes me think about buses like no other, since everything that exists correlates to a mixer track.

item.title: GNOME
item.description: on a 1080p monitor it’s horrendous. but on anything higher it’s brilliant.

item.title: rym
item.description: i don’t really like engaging with rate your music (frankly - at least from a distance - though i could be wrong, it seems rather insuffereble) as a site but damn is it a good learning resource / database if you want to learn more about certain genres or artists

item.title: a
item.description:
“how will we differentiate the budget version of our product?”

“got it! we append the first letter of the alphabet to the end of it.”
keyboard shortcuts should be CLUSTERED on the LEFT SIDE of the KEYBOARD. ALWAYS.
